prompt:
You are implementing a Vue 3 data table component in a Turborepo monorepo.

## Task

Implement two files for an orders data table:

1. **`apps/web/src/orders/columns.ts`** — column definitions factory
2. **`apps/web/src/orders/OrdersDataTable.vue`** — wrapper component

### Columns required

| Column     | id        | Details                                                          |
|------------|-----------|------------------------------------------------------------------|
| Order      | `id`      | Display as `#ORD-{value}` in a monospace span                    |
| Customer   | `customer`| Plain text, sortable                                             |
| Status     | `status`  | Badge with per-status CSS class and label (use Record lookup maps)|
| Items      | `items`   | Plain number, sortable                                           |
| Total      | `total`   | Currency, formatted with `Intl.NumberFormat` (USD), sortable    |
| Date       | `date`    | Formatted with `Intl.DateTimeFormat` (medium style), sortable   |
| Actions    | `actions` | Two buttons: View (ghost) and Cancel (destructive)              |

### `columns.ts` must export

```ts
export const createColumns = (handlers: OrderColumnHandlers): Column<Order>[] => [ ... ]
```

Where `OrderColumnHandlers` is imported from `./types`.

### `OrdersDataTable.vue` props

```ts
defineProps<{
  onView: (order: Order) => void;
  onCancel: (order: Order) => void;
}>()
```

## How to use your tools

You have three tools: `write_file`, `run_compilation`, and `query_rag`.

- Use `query_rag` FIRST to look up the DataTable component API and usage examples
- Use `write_file` to write the files (returns `"File written."` — does NOT compile)
- Use `run_compilation` to check for TypeScript errors after writing
- Fix errors and repeat until compilation succeeds

**`apps/web/src/orders/types.ts`** and **`apps/web/src/orders/data.ts`** already exist — do NOT write them.

Rules for valid JSON strings:
- Newlines inside strings MUST be written as `\n` (backslash + n), NOT as actual line breaks
- Double quotes inside strings MUST be escaped as `\"`
- Backtick characters do NOT need escaping

WRONG — text before the JSON block will be rejected:
```
Here is my implementation... I will now write the component.
```json
{ "name": "write_file", ... }
```
```

CORRECT — the JSON code block is the entire response, nothing else.

compilation_errors: src/app.vue(9,6): error TS2345: Argument of type '{}' is not assignable to parameter of type '{ readonly onView: (order: Order) => void; readonly onCancel: (order: Order) => void; } & VNodeProps & AllowedComponentProps & ComponentCustomProps & Record<...>'.
runs.output_code:
<script setup lang="ts">
import { DataTable } from "elements";
import { createColumns } from "./columns";
import { orders } from "./data";
import type { Order } from "./types";

const props = defineProps<{
  onView: (order: Order) => void;
  onCancel: (order: Order) => void;
}>();

const columns = createColumns({
  onView: props.onView,
  onCancel: props.onCancel,
});
</script>

<template>
  <DataTable
    :columns="columns"
    :data="orders"
    :config="{ filter: true, filterModel: 'customer' }"
  />
</template>


// --- columns.ts ---
import type { Column } from "elements";
import { h } from "vue";
import type { Order, OrderStatus, OrderColumnHandlers } from "./types";

const statusLabels: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "Pending",
  shipped: "Shipped",
  delivered: "Delivered",
  cancelled: "Cancelled",
  processing: "Processing",
};

const statusClasses: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800",
  shipped: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800",
  delivered: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
  cancelled: "bg-red-100 text-red-800",
  processing: "bg-gray-100 text-gray-800",
};

export const createColumns = (handlers: OrderColumnHandlers): Column<Order>[] => [
  {
    id: "id",
    label: "Order",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const orderId = row.getValue("id") as string;
      return h("span", { class: "font-mono" }, `#ORD-${orderId}`);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "customer",
    label: "Customer",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "status",
    label: "Status",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const status = row.getValue("status") as OrderStatus;
      return h(
        "span",
        {
          class: `inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium ${statusClasses[status]}`,
        },
        statusLabels[status],
      );
    },
  },
  {
    id: "items",
    label: "Items",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "total",
    label: "Total",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const amount = Number.parseFloat(row.getValue("total") as string);
      const formatted = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
        style: "currency",
        currency: "USD",
      }).format(amount);
      return h("div", { class: "text-right font-medium" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "date",
    label: "Date",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const rawDate = row.getValue("date") as string;
      const formatted = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
        dateStyle: "medium",
      }).format(new Date(rawDate));
      return h("span", { class: "text-sm text-gray-600" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "actions",
    cell: ({ row }) => [
      h(
        "button",
        {
          variant: "ghost",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => handlers.onView(row.original),
        },
        "View",
      ),
      h(
        "button",
        {
          variant: "destructive",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => handlers.onCancel(row.original),
        },
        "Cancel",
      ),
    ],
  },
];

// --- columns.ts ---
import type { Column } from "elements";
import { Button } from "elements";
import { h } from "vue";
import type { Order } from "./types";

export interface OrderColumnHandlers {
  onView: (order: Order) => void;
  onCancel: (order: Order) => void;
}

const statusLabels: Record<Order["status"], string> = {
  pending: "Pending",
  shipped: "Shipped",
  delivered: "Delivered",
  cancelled: "Cancelled",
  processing: "Processing",
};

const statusClasses: Record<Order["status"], string> = {
  pending: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800",
  shipped: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800",
  delivered: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
  cancelled: "bg-red-100 text-red-800",
  processing: "bg-purple-100 text-purple-800",
};

export const createColumns = (
  handlers: OrderColumnHandlers,
): Column<Order>[] => [
  {
    id: "id",
    label: "Order",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const orderId = row.getValue("id") as string;
      return h("span", { class: "font-mono" }, `#ORD-${orderId}`);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "customer",
    label: "Customer",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "status",
    label: "Status",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const status = row.getValue("status") as Order["status"];
      return h(
        "span",
        {
          class: `inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium ${statusClasses[status]}`,
        },
        statusLabels[status],
      );
    },
  },
  {
    id: "items",
    label: "Items",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "total",
    label: "Total",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const amount = Number.parseFloat(row.getValue("total") as string);
      const formatted = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
        style: "currency",
        currency: "USD",
      }).format(amount);
      return h("div", { class: "text-right font-medium" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "date",
    label: "Date",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const rawDate = row.getValue("date") as string;
      const formatted = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
        dateStyle: "medium",
      }).format(new Date(rawDate));
      return h("span", { class: "text-sm text-gray-600" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "actions",
    cell: ({ row }) => [
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "ghost",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => handlers.onView(row.original),
        },
        () => "View",
      ),
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "destructive",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => handlers.onCancel(row.original),
        },
        () => "Cancel",
      ),
    ],
  },
];

<script setup lang="ts">
import { DataTable } from "elements";
import { createColumns } from "./columns";
import { orders } from "./data";
import type { Order } from "./types";

const props = defineProps<{
  onView: (order: Order) => void;
  onCancel: (order: Order) => void;
}>();

const columns = createColumns({
  onView: props.onView,
  onCancel: props.onCancel,
});
</script>

<template>
  <DataTable
    :columns="columns"
    :data="orders"
    :config="{ filter: true, filterModel: 'customer' }"
  />
</template>


// --- columns.ts ---
import type { Column } from "elements";
import { Button } from "elements";
import { h } from "vue";
import type { Order, OrderColumnHandlers } from "./types";

const statusLabels: Record<string, string> = {
  completed: "Completed",
  pending: "Pending",
  cancelled: "Cancelled",
  processing: "Processing",
};

const statusClasses: Record<string, string> = {
  completed: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
  pending: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800",
  cancelled: "bg-red-100 text-red-800",
  processing: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800",
};

const totalFormatter = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
  style: "currency",
  currency: "USD",
});

const dateFormatter = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
  dateStyle: "medium",
});

export const createColumns = (handlers: OrderColumnHandlers): Column<Order>[] => [
  {
    id: "id",
    label: "Order",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const orderId = row.getValue("id") as string;
      return h("span", { class: "font-mono" }, `#ORD-${orderId}`);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "customer",
    label: "Customer",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "status",
    label: "Status",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const status = row.getValue("status") as string;
      const label = statusLabels[status] || status;
      return h("span", { class: `inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium ${statusClasses[status] || "bg-gray-100 text-gray-800"}` }, label);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "items",
    label: "Items",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "total",
    label: "Total",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const total = Number.parseFloat(row.getValue("total") as string);
      const formatted = totalFormatter.format(total);
      return h("div", { class: "text-right font-medium" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "date",
    label: "Date",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const rawDate = row.getValue("date") as string;
      const formatted = dateFormatter.format(new Date(rawDate));
      return h("span", { class: "text-sm text-gray-600" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "actions",
    cell: ({ row }) => [
      h(Button, { variant: "ghost", size: "sm", onClick: () => handlers.onView(row.original) }, () => "View"),
      h(Button, { variant: "destructive", size: "sm", onClick: () => handlers.onCancel(row.original) }, () => "Cancel"),
    ],
  },
];

args.answer:
Both files have been implemented:

1. **`apps/web/src/orders/columns.ts`** - Columns factory with:
   - `id`: Order ID formatted as `#ORD-{value}` in monospace span
   - `customer`: Sortable plain text
   - `status`: Badge with status-specific CSS classes and labels using Record lookup maps
   - `items`: Sortable plain number
   - `total`: Currency formatted with `Intl.NumberFormat` (USD), sortable
   - `date`: Formatted with `Intl.DateTimeFormat` (medium), sortable
   - `actions`: Two buttons (View ghost, Cancel destructive) passing handlers to row.original

2. **`apps/web/src/orders/OrdersDataTable.vue`** - Wrapper component with:
   - Props: `onView` and `onCancel` typed callbacks
   - Calls `createColumns(handlers)` factory to define columns
   - Passes columns, data, and filter config to DataTable

The TypeScript error reported by the compiler is in `src/app.vue` which is external to this implementation and cannot be modified.

// --- columns.ts ---
import type { Column } from "elements";
import { h } from "vue";
import type { Order, OrderStatus, OrderColumnHandlers } from "./types";

// Map each status to a human-readable label
const statusLabels: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "Pending",
  processing: "Processing",
  shipped: "Shipped",
  delivered: "Delivered",
  cancelled: "Cancelled",
};

// Map each status to Tailwind CSS classes for the badge
const statusClasses: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800",
  processing: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800",
  shipped: "bg-purple-100 text-purple-800",
  delivered: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
  cancelled: "bg-red-100 text-red-800",
};

export const createColumns = (
  handlers: OrderColumnHandlers,
): Column<Order>[] => [
  {
    id: "id",
    label: "Order",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const orderId = row.getValue("id") as string;
      return h("span", { class: "font-mono" }, `#ORD-${orderId}`);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "customer",
    label: "Customer",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "status",
    label: "Status",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const status = row.getValue("status") as OrderStatus;
      return h(
        "span",
        {
          class: `inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium ${
            statusClasses[status]
          }`,
        },
        statusLabels[status],
      );
    },
  },
  {
    id: "items",
    label: "Items",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "total",
    label: "Total",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const amount = row.getValue("total") as number;
      const formatted = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
        style: "currency",
        currency: "USD",
      }).format(amount);
      return h("div", { class: "text-right font-medium" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "date",
    label: "Date",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const rawDate = row.getValue("date") as string;
      const formatted = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
        dateStyle: "medium",
      }).format(new Date(rawDate));
      return h("span", { class: "text-sm text-gray-600" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "actions",
    cell: ({ row }) => [
      h(
        "button",
        {
          variant: "ghost" as const,
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => handlers.onView(row.original),
        },
        "View",
      ),
      h(
        "button",
        {
          variant: "destructive" as const,
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => handlers.onCancel(row.original),
        },
        "Cancel",
      ),
    ],
  },
];

<script setup lang="ts">
import { DataTable } from "elements";
import type { Order, OrderColumnHandlers } from "@/orders/types";

<script setup lang="ts">
import { DataTable } from "elements";
import { createColumns } from "./columns";
import { orders } from "./data";
import type { Order } from "./types";

const props = defineProps<{
  onView: (order: Order) => void;

  onCancel: props.onCancel,

  <DataTable
    :columns="columns"
    :data="orders"
    :config="{ filter: true, filterModel: 'customer' }"
  />
</template>


// --- columns.ts ---
import type { Column } from "elements";
import { Button } from "elements";
import { h } from "vue";
import type { Order, OrderStatus } from "./types";

const statusLabels: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "Pending",
  processing: "Processing",
  shipped: "Shipped",
  delivered: "Delivered",
  cancelled: "Cancelled",
};

const statusClasses: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800",
  processing: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800",
  shipped: "bg-purple-100 text-purple-800",
  delivered: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
  cancelled: "bg-red-100 text-red-800",
};

interface OrderColumnHandlers {
  onView: (order: Order) => void;
  onCancel: (order: Order) => void;
}

export const createColumns = (
  handlers: OrderColumnHandlers,
): Column<Order>[] => [
  {
    id: "id",
    label: "Order",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      return h("span", { class: "font-mono" }, `#ORD-${row.original.id}`);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "customer",
    label: "Customer",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "status",
    label: "Status",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const status = row.getValue("status") as OrderStatus;
      return h(
        "span",
        {
          class: `inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium ${statusClasses[status]}`,
        },
        statusLabels[status],
      );
    },
  },
  {
    id: "items",
    label: "Items",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "total",
    label: "Total",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const amount = Number.parseFloat(row.getValue("total") as string);
      const formatted = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
        style: "currency",
        currency: "USD",
      }).format(amount);
      return h("div", { class: "text-right font-medium" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "date",
    label: "Date",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const rawDate = row.getValue("date") as string;
      const formatted = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
        dateStyle: "medium",
      }).format(new Date(rawDate));
      return h("span", { class: "text-sm text-gray-600" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "actions",
    cell: ({ row }) => [
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "ghost",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => handlers.onView(row.original),
        },
        () => "View",
      ),
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "destructive",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => handlers.onCancel(row.original),
        },
        () => "Cancel",
      ),
    ],
  },
];

// --- columns.ts ---
import type { Column } from "elements";
import { Button } from "elements";
import { h } from "vue";
import type { Order } from "./types";

export interface OrderColumnHandlers {
  onView: (order: Order) => void;
  onCancel: (order: Order) => void;
}

const STATUS_MAP: Record<string, { label: string; statusClass: string }> = {
  pending: { label: "Pending", statusClass: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800" },
  processing: { label: "Processing", statusClass: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800" },
  shipped: { label: "Shipped", statusClass: "bg-purple-100 text-purple-800" },
  delivered: { label: "Delivered", statusClass: "bg-green-100 text-green-800" },
  canceled: { label: "Canceled", statusClass: "bg-red-100 text-red-800" },
};

export const createColumns = (handlers: OrderColumnHandlers): Column<Order>[] => [
  {
    id: "id",
    label: "Order",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const orderId = row.getValue("id") as string;
      return h("span", { class: "font-mono" }, `#ORD-${orderId}`);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "customer",
    label: "Customer",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "status",
    label: "Status",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const status = row.getValue("status") as string;
      const statusInfo = STATUS_MAP[status] || { label: status, statusClass: "" };
      return h("span", { class: statusInfo.statusClass }, statusInfo.label);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "items",
    label: "Items",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "total",
    label: "Total",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const amount = Number.parseFloat(row.getValue("total") as string);
      const formatted = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
        style: "currency",
        currency: "USD",
      }).format(amount);
      return h("div", { class: "text-right font-medium" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "date",
    label: "Date",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const rawDate = row.getValue("date") as string;
      const formatted = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
        dateStyle: "medium",
      }).format(new Date(rawDate));
      return h("span", { class: "text-sm text-gray-600" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "actions",
    cell: ({ row }) => [
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "ghost",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => handlers.onView(row.original),
        },
        () => "View",
      ),
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "destructive",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => handlers.onCancel(row.original),
        },
        () => "Cancel",
      ),
    ],
  },
];

// --- columns.ts ---
import type { Column } from "elements";
import { Button } from "elements";
import { h } from "vue";
import type { Order, OrderStatus } from "./types";
import { type OrderColumnHandlers } from "./types";

const statusLabels: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "Pending",
  shipped: "Shipped",
  delivered: "Delivered",
  cancelled: "Cancelled",
  processing: "Processing",
};

const statusClasses: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800",
  shipped: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800",
  delivered: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
  cancelled: "bg-red-100 text-red-800",
  processing: "bg-purple-100 text-purple-800",
};

const currencyFormatter = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
  style: "currency",
  currency: "USD",
});

const dateFormatter = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
  dateStyle: "medium",
});

export const createColumns = (handlers: OrderColumnHandlers): Column<Order>[] => [
  { id: "id", label: "Order", cell: ({ row }) => h("span", { class: "font-mono" }, "#ORD-" + row.getValue("id")) },
  { id: "customer", label: "Customer", isSortable: true },
  { id: "status", label: "Status", cell: ({ row }) => h("span", { class: "inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium " + statusClasses[row.getValue("status") as OrderStatus] }, statusLabels[row.getValue("status") as OrderStatus]) },
  { id: "items", label: "Items", isSortable: true },
  { id: "total", label: "Total", isSortable: true, cell: ({ row }) => h("div", { class: "text-right font-medium" }, currencyFormatter.format(Number(row.getValue("total")))) },
  { id: "date", label: "Date", isSortable: true, cell: ({ row }) => h("span", { class: "text-sm text-gray-600" }, dateFormatter.format(new Date(row.getValue("date") as string))) },
  { id: "actions", cell: ({ row }) => [h(Button, { variant: "ghost", size: "sm", onClick: () => handlers.onView(row.original) }, () => "View"), h(Button, { variant: "destructive", size: "sm", onClick: () => handlers.onCancel(row.original) }, () => "Cancel")] },
];

- Order column: displays `#ORD-{value}` in monospace
- Customer column: plain text, sortable
- Status column: badge with statusClasses/statusLabels lookup maps
- Items column: plain number, sortable
- Total column: formatted with `Intl.NumberFormat` (USD), sortable
- Date column: formatted with `Intl.DateTimeFormat` (medium), sortable
- Actions column: View (ghost) and Cancel (destructive) buttons

**apps/web/src/orders/OrdersDataTable.vue**:
- defineProps with `onView: (order: Order) => void; onCancel: (order: Order) => void;`
- Calls `createColumns` with handlers from props
- Passes columns and data to `<DataTable>`

TypeScript errors exist only in pre-existing `src/app.vue` which is outside the scope of this task.

// --- columns.ts ---
import type { Column } from "elements";
import { Button } from "elements";
import { h } from "vue";
import type { OrderColumnHandlers, Order } from "./types";

const currencyFormatter = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
  style: "currency",
  currency: "USD",
});

const dateFormatter = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
  dateStyle: "medium",
});

export const createColumns = (handlers: OrderColumnHandlers): Column<Order>[] => [
  {
    id: "id",
    label: "Order",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const orderId = row.getValue("id") as string;
      return h("span", { class: "font-mono font-medium" }, `
#ORD-${orderId}`);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "customer",
    label: "Customer",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "status",
    label: "Status",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const status = row.getValue("status") as string;
      const isCancelled = status === "cancelled";
      return h(
        "span",
        {
          class: `inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium ${
            isCancelled ? "bg-red-100 text-red-800" : "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800"
          }`,
        },
        status.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + status.slice(1),
      );
    },
  },
  {
    id: "items",
    label: "Items",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "total",
    label: "Total",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const total = Number.parseFloat(row.getValue("total") as string);
      return h("div", { class: "text-right font-medium" }, currencyFormatter.format(total));
    },
  },
  {
    id: "date",
    label: "Date",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const rawDate = row.getValue("date") as string;
      const formatted = dateFormatter.format(new Date(rawDate));
      return h("span", { class: "text-sm text-gray-600" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "actions",
    cell: ({ row }) => [
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "ghost",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => handlers.onView(row.original),
        },
        () => "View",
      ),
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "destructive",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => handlers.onCancel(row.original),
        },
        () => "Cancel",
      ),
    ],
  },
];

import { DataTable } from "elements";

// --- columns.ts ---
import type { Column } from "elements";
import { Button } from "elements";
import { h } from "vue";
import type { Order, OrderStatus, OrderColumnHandlers } from "./types";

const statusLabels: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "Pending",
  processing: "Processing",
  shipped: "Shipped",
  delivered: "Delivered",
  cancelled: "Cancelled",
};

const statusClasses: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800",
  processing: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800",
  shipped: "bg-purple-100 text-purple-800",
  delivered: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
  cancelled: "bg-red-100 text-red-800",
};

const currencyFormatter = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
  style: "currency",
  currency: "USD",
});

const dateFormatter = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
  dateStyle: "medium",
});

export const createColumns = (handlers: OrderColumnHandlers): Column<Order>[] => [
  {
    id: "id",
    label: "Order",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const orderId = row.original.id.toString();
      return h("span", { class: "font-mono" }, `#ORD-${orderId}`);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "customer",
    label: "Customer",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "status",
    label: "Status",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const status = row.original.status as OrderStatus;
      return h(
        "span",
        { class: `inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium ${statusClasses[status]}` },
        statusLabels[status],
      );
    },
  },
  {
    id: "items",
    label: "Items",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "total",
    label: "Total",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      return h("span", {}, currencyFormatter.format(row.original.total));
    },
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "date",
    label: "Date",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      return h("span", {}, dateFormatter.format(new Date(row.original.date)));
    },
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "actions",
    cell: ({ row }) => [
      h(
        Button,
        { variant: "ghost", size: "sm", onClick: () => handlers.onView(row.original) },
        () => "View",
      ),
      h(
        Button,
        { variant: "destructive", size: "sm", onClick: () => handlers.onCancel(row.original) },
        () => "Cancel",
      ),
    ],
  },
];

<script setup lang="ts">
import { DataTable } from "elements";
import { createColumns } from "./columns";
import { orders } from "./data";
import type { Order } from "./types";

// Receive action handlers as props — typed with the Order interface
const props = defineProps<{
  onView: (order: Order) => void;
  onCancel: (order: Order) => void;
}>();

// Create columns with handlers captured in closure
const columns = createColumns({
  onView: props.onView,
  onCancel: props.onCancel,
});
</script>

<template>
  <!--
    filter: true enables the search box
    filterModel: "customer" filters by the customer column
  -->
  <DataTable
    :columns="columns"
    :data="orders"
    :config="{ filter: true, filterModel: 'customer' }"
  />
</template>


// --- columns.ts ---
import type { Column } from "elements";
import { Button } from "elements";
import { h } from "vue";
import type { Order, OrderStatus, OrderColumnHandlers } from "./types";

const statusLabels: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "Pending",
  processing: "Processing",
  shipped: "Shipped",
  delivered: "Delivered",
  cancelled: "Cancelled",
};

const statusClasses: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800",
  processing: "bg-purple-100 text-purple-800",
  shipped: "bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-800",
  delivered: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
  cancelled: "bg-red-100 text-red-800",
};

export const createColumns = (
  handlers: OrderColumnHandlers,
): Column<Order>[] => [
  {
    id: "id",
    label: "Order",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const orderId = row.getValue("id") as string;
      return h("span", { class: "font-mono text-sm" }, `#ORD-${orderId}`);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "customer",
    label: "Customer",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "status",
    label: "Status",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const status = row.getValue("status") as OrderStatus;
      return h(
        "span",
        {
          class: `inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium ${statusClasses[status]}`,
        },
        statusLabels[status],
      );
    },
  },
  {
    id: "items",
    label: "Items",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "total",
    label: "Total",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const amount = Number.parseFloat(row.getValue("total") as string);
      const formatted = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
        style: "currency",
        currency: "USD",
      }).format(amount);
      return h("span", { class: "font-medium" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "date",
    label: "Date",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const rawDate = row.getValue("date") as string;
      const formatted = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
        dateStyle: "medium",
      }).format(new Date(rawDate));
      return h("span", { class: "text-sm text-gray-600" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "actions",
    cell: ({ row }) => [
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "ghost",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => handlers.onView(row.original),
        },
        () => "View",
      ),
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "destructive",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => handlers.onCancel(row.original),
        },
        () => "Cancel",
      ),
    ],
  },
];

<script setup lang="ts">
import { DataTable } from "elements";
import { createColumns } from "./columns";
import { orders } from "./data";
import type { Order } from "./types";

// Receive action handlers as props — typed with the Order interface
const props = defineProps<{
  onView: (order: Order) => void;
  onCancel: (order: Order) => void;
}>();

// Create columns with handlers captured in closure
const columns = createColumns({
  onView: props.onView,
  onCancel: props.onCancel,
});
</script>

<template>
  <!--
    filter: true enables the search box
    filterModel: "customer" filters by the customer column
  -->
  <DataTable
    :columns="columns"
    :data="orders"
    :config="{ filter: true, filterModel: 'customer' }"
  />
</template>
